Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a docs-only PR, not a bug report. The relevant verification path is source comparison against the existing T3 Chat provider implementation.

target.title: docs: add T3 Chat provider detail page
target.body:
## Summary

Adds `docs/t3chat.md`, which was missing from the provider docs directory. Every other active provider that has a settings UI has a dedicated detail page; T3 Chat has been in the codebase since #1091 (merged June 2025) but had only the short `providers.md` entry.

The page is derived entirely from the source files:
- `T3ChatProviderDescriptor.swift` — fetch pipeline, CLI names, dashboard URLs
- `T3ChatUsageFetcher.swift` — tRPC endpoint, cookie import, cURL header parsing, error types
- `T3ChatUsageSnapshot.swift` — field mapping and window construction
- `T3ChatProviderImplementation.swift` — settings pickers (cookie source, cookie field, manual-only visibility)
- `T3ChatSettingsStore.swift` — cookie source and header persistence

## Changes

- Added `docs/t3chat.md`: setup (automatic and manual), data source, field-to-window mapping table, usage windows explanation, CLI examples, error table, and key files.
- Added `- Details: `docs/t3chat.md`.` to the T3 Chat entry in `docs/providers.md`.

## Checks run

```
node Scripts/check-documentation-links.mjs  → documentation links OK: 136 local links
node Scripts/check-site-locales.mjs         → app/site locales OK: 21 locales, 50 site messages
node Scripts/generate-llms.mjs --check      → llms index OK: docs/llms.txt
bash Scripts/lint.sh lint-linux             → 0 violations, 0 serious in 1195 files
git diff --check                            → clean
```
target.author: kiranmagic7
